name: Classy Agency
tagline: Cream agency proposal with serif headlines, muted taupe geometry, olive labels, and restrained modular layouts.

palette.description: cream paper with taupe rectangles, olive grey blocks, charcoal labels, and restrained serif type

typography.style: classic serif headings with sober agency body text

best_for: Agency proposals, brand strategy decks, service pitches, and consulting-lite presentations that need warmth and taste.
avoid_for: Neon launches, dense data dashboards, technical system architecture, or medical explainers.

source_inspiration.name: Slidesgo Elegant and Classy Style Agency
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS interpretation based on public visual reference; not a pixel copy and does not reuse source assets.
